channel.title: Journal of Contemporary Antisemitism
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Contemporary Antisemitism

item.title: Contents
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca-2024-toc0703

item.title: Editorial

item.title: Antisemitic Jews: Psychological Explanations
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.169

item.title: Does German School and Extracurricular Education Address the Topic of “Antisemitism and Muslims”—and How Does It? Content Fields and Characteristics of Educational Approaches
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.170

item.title: At the Neoprogressive-Neofascist Convergence: Constructing the Zionist Fiend at Counterpunch
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.171

item.title: My Jewish Name, Face, and Voice: Navigating Antisemitism as a Graduate Student in Jewish Education at Stanford
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.172

item.title: “Gegen den Geist des Sozialismus”: Anarchistische und kommunistische Kritik der Judenfeindschaft in der KPD zur Zeit der Weimarer Republik
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.173

item.title: The 7 Deadly Myths: Antisemitism from the Time of Christ to Kanye West
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.174

item.title: Islamic Antisemitism and the Middle East: The 1948 Arab War against Israel and the Aftershock of World War II
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.175

item.title: Can “The Whole World” Be Wrong? Lethal Journalism, Antisemitism, and Global Jihad
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.176

item.title: The Rebirth of Antisemitism in the 21st Century
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.177

item.title: Three Faces of Antisemitism: Right, Left and Islamist
item.description: Article by David Fraser DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.3.178
